overall.description: A first-person walk along a post-apocalyptic waterfront in a video game (Fallout 4), starting with a view of a river and distant city skyline featuring a distinctive red tower, then proceeding along a concrete promenade past a crashed bus wreck toward a large neoclassical stone building. The environment shows signs of decay with bare trees and derelict vehicles under a bright clear sky.

events.description: wooden boat sails out of frame to the left
moving from rocky shore onto paved waterfront walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the shoreline while panning right to view the city skyline across the water

entered.detail: tall red and white futuristic communications tower with dish arrays
large wooden sailing vessel with mast floating on the river
dense cluster of skyscrapers and high-rise buildings across the water
uneven rocky and debris-strewn ground at the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide post-apocalyptic waterfront with a view across the river to a dense city skyline dominated by a distinctive red tower. A wooden boat floats on the water before exiting left, and the camera walks forward along a rocky shore before transitioning to a paved walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete riverside promenade with derelict vehicle

events.description: crashed yellow and red bus wreck comes into view on the right
camera passes alongside the derelict bus wreckage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete waterfront path, passing the crashed bus on the right

entered.detail: concrete balustrade separating the walkway from the water
derelict yellow and orange bus wrecked and overgrown on the hillside
tall green lamppost with hanging lantern fixture
large classical stone building with columns and domed roof

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete riverside promenade with a stone railing on the left, the camera passes a prominent crashed bus wreck on the right. A large neoclassical stone building becomes visible in the distance while the city skyline recedes to the left.

events.description: crashed bus recedes into the background as camera advances
approaching the main entrance stairs of the stone building complex

agents.ego_description: approaching the large stone building entrance, passing leafless dead trees on the right

entered.detail: cluster of leafless trees in front of the stone building

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the large stone building as the crashed bus falls behind. The camera walks past dead trees toward the building's entrance stairs, with the waterfront railing now receding into the distance on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a wide river vista toward the imposing facade of a neoclassical stone building. It begins on a rocky shore overlooking a post-apocalyptic city skyline dominated by a red tower, with a wooden boat drifting across the water as the camera transitions onto a paved walkway. As the camera proceeds along a concrete riverside promenade, the city skyline recedes to the left while a prominent crashed bus wreck appears on the right. The scene then shifts focus toward the distant stone architecture, passing by dead trees as the bus wreck falls behind. Finally, the camera approaches the building's entrance stairs, leaving the waterfront railing to fade into the distance.
